title: Final Sunrise
description: After the first Minecraft day, it'll never be day again! This mod adds the challenge of permanent night to your world. Can you survive?
body:
# Overview

This mod sets the minecraft world time to 18000 every tick to make it always midnight. A small, but impactful change to add challenge to the survival experience. This mod does not affect the Nether, End, or Modded Dimensions even if they have a Day/Night Cycle.

# Features

Phantom Spawning is now optional! The new mechanic requires you to sleep with open sky above you for one to spawn.

The Daylight Potion turns it to day time when consumed! It can be brewed with a Nether Star and a Night Vision Potion.

## Music Discs

The new craftable music discs add an exciting but optional reason to explore different biomes!

- Empty Disc (This is just an ingredient for the actual Music Discs.)
- Submerged - BurgyPlus
- Sifter - BurgyPlus
- Luminescence - BurgyPlus

All Recipes are shown in the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/final-sunrise/gallery)
